name: Tiramisu Toffee Torte
recipeIngredient: 6 3/8 oz toffee candy bars (4 bars), very finely chopped
1 3/8 oz toffee candy bar (1 bar), chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch or 8-inch round cake pans.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, 1 cup of coffee, and egg whites. Mix on low speed until moistened; beat for 2 minutes at high speed.
4. Fold in the chopped toffee candy bars. Spread batter evenly in the prepared pans.
5. Bake 9-inch pans for 20-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean (Bake 8-inch pans for 30-40 minutes). Cool for 10 minutes, then remove from pans and cool completely.
6. In a medium bowl, combine sugar, chocolate syrup, and cream cheese; beat until smooth.
7. Add whipped cream and vanilla; beat until light and fluffy. Refrigerate until ready to use.
8. To assemble the cake, slice each layer in half horizontally to make 4 layers. Drizzle each cut side with 1/4 cup of coffee.
9. Place one layer, coffee side up, on a serving plate; spread with 3/4 cup frosting. Repeat with the second and third cake layers.
10. Top with the remaining cake layer. Frost the sides and top of the cake with the remaining frosting. Garnish the top with chopped toffee bars.
11. Store in the refrigerator.
High Altitude Notes:
Above 3500 feet: Add 1/4 cup flour to dry cake mix. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
